raw_excerpt:
"""Section 11 — Aggressor classification per trade per product/day.

R5 strips the buyer/seller fields, so we can't identify counterparties. But
each trade can still be Lee–Ready signed: compare the trade price to the
contemporaneous prevailing mid (forward-fill of the last book snapshot at
or before the trade timestamp). Buy-aggressor: price ≥ mid; sell-aggressor:
price < mid; tie: drop.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from _common import (DAYS, ROUND5_PRODUCTS, fmt_section_header, add_mid,
                     group_of, load_prices, load_trades, save_outputs)


def main() -> pd.DataFrame:
    print(fmt_section_header("Section 11 — Aggressor (Lee-Ready)"))
    rows = []
